creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sat Aug 11 19:00:25 2012
New Revision: 302419
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302419

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.11

  https://git-wip-us.apache.org/repos/asf?p=cassandra.git;a=blob_plain;f=CHANGES.txt;hb=refs/tags/cassandra-1.0.11

+++ head/databases/cassandra/Makefile	Sat Aug 11 19:00:25 2012	(r302419)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	cassandra
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.10
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.11
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	cassandra/${PORTVERSION}
